title: Florida Special
writer: Clarence Budington Kelland, David Boehm, Marguerite Roberts
actors: Jack Oakie, Sally Eilers, Kent Taylor
plot: Newspaper reporter Bangs Carter and his rich buddy Wally Tucker end up on a train bound for Florida with jewel thieves and Wally's ex-girlfriend. Bangs falls for a passenger along the way as they try to catch the crooks.
